variants.title: HiFi Filter SAO 160065 Breather Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SAO 160065 Breather Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SAO 160065 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: BREATHER FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 110.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 93.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 46.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 116.0 mm
